The '''''Kubrai''-class S4 transport''' was a transport starship produced by [[Kubrai Transportation]]. It was 20 meters long and was armed with two [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] cannons. The Kubari S4 was quite expensive—during the days of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] new ship price was 180,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], mostly because of its great sublight [[Ion engine/Legends|engines]] and fast Class I [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]].

==Appearances==
*{{GamerCite|9|Race for the Tessent}}
